rounds.my_message: We did well last round! I reward cooperation and mirror defections—mutual +2/round remains best for both of us. If you stick to it, so will I. Let's see if we can keep this going and beat the risk of single-round gambles.

We're off to a strong, cooperative start! I’ll continue to reward your cooperation and mirror your choices. Steady +2/round keeps us both ahead—let’s keep this teamwork going and build the best results possible for both of us.
